description_long: This bungalow is a compact, modern residential building with a gable roof featuring two prominent chimneys and skylights. The exterior walls are primarily white with contrasting dark window frames and a gray roof, while the base is finished with a stone or concrete trim. The front facade includes a covered porch with wooden posts and a small set of steps leading up to the entrance. Large windows are present on the front and side, allowing for ample natural light, while the rear features smaller, more utilitarian windows. The structure sits on a raised platform, bordered by low stone planters or retaining walls. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on geometric lines and practical outdoor space.
description: A modern, white bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, and large front windows, accented by stone trim and a raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and two large front windows beneath the gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the triangular gable, large side windows, and stone-bordered platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, smaller windows, and the continuation of the stone trim and planters.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three small square windows and the sloped roofline, less architectural detail than the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows, smaller rear windows
